ksa_text: Knowledge of model inventory management practices including model tiering by materiality and complexity, risk classification, lifecycle tracking from development through retirement, and documentation standards.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-K-011 (Risk Management/Knowledge) excluded: edge_case: 0 core signals, 0 OOS signals, composite 0.426. Highest framework: NICE at 0.426.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with edge_case scope, Risk Management, composite 0.426. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge exclusion of Risk Management (composite 0.426)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Risk Management at ~85% market presence. Risk management (ISO 14971, clinical risk, FMEA) appears in virtually all SaMD QRA postings. Exclusion consistent with role scope.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent. Final decision: exclude.
